caption: A man wearing glasses, black headphones, and a tall, silver, textured wig sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie. He is positioned behind a professional microphone on a boom arm, facing towards the left. Behind him, the wall is decorated with several framed photographs and a mannequin wearing a black garment. To his right, clothing racks are partially visible. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his facial expression and head angle as he speaks. On-screen graphics are present in each frame, featuring a logo with a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST" below it. The background remains static, while the man's subtle movements indicate he is engaged in a conversation during a podcast recording.
